title: Frontend Engineer
description: Built React and TypeScript micro-frontends for enterprise product experiences including Triumph Motorcycles and Jotun, collaborating closely with backend teams on API integration and release delivery
Led development of Silentnight's design system and component library, defining reusable UI patterns that improved consistency, accessibility, and implementation speed
Translated design and product requirements into maintainable frontend architecture using Vite, styled-components, component state, and production-ready testing and review practices
